name: WiAR
summary: Public cross-environment WiFi activity and gesture dataset with sixteen actions performed by ten volunteers in three indoor environments.

settings.scenario: Empty room, meeting room, and office with activity and gesture classes

original.license: Dataset license and current official download require confirmation

standardization.notes: Intel 5300 beamforming-record parser is implemented from the official MATLAB/C reference; current release access still requires confirmation.
